title: Accessibility - Large Text
scenario: Verify that the app displays enlarged text properly across all screens when "Larger Text" accessibility setting is enabled at maximum slider in Phone Settings.
steps: 2. Navigate to Accessibility > Display & Text Size.
3. Enable the "Larger Text" accessibility setting and drag the slider to the maximum (largest) size.
5. Navigate through Poly Lens menus and verify that all text is enlarged and displayed properly without truncation or overlap.
6. Open Device settings within the app and verify enlarged text displays correctly.
7. Access DFU (Device Firmware Update) screens and verify text is properly enlarged and readable.
8. Open Onboardings/Quick Guides within the app and verify enlarged text displays correctly without layout issues.
expected: The app displays enlarged text properly across Poly Lens menus, Device settings, DFU screens, and Onboardings/Quick Guides without truncation, overlap, or layout issues.
